title: Fee
description: Fee schema from Burger King's Partners API

type.description:
Type of fee.

|Fee Type|Description                  |
|--------|-----------------------------|
|BAG_FEE |A fee for bags, as present in some municipalities for single use plastic bags               |
|CUP_FEE |A fee for cups, as present in some municipalities for single use cups               |
|DELIVERY_FEE|A fee for delivery, as often charged by delivery fulfillment providers           |
|SERVICE_FEE|A generic service fee. An example might be California's "driver benefits" fee (Proposition 22)        |

total.description: Total amount to charge for the fee
